description_long: This chaise features a modern, geometric design with a deep, semi-circular seat basin set within a square, glossy black frame. The seat is supported by a minimalist metal base with slender, tubular legs that provide an open and airy appearance. The front of the chaise is open, allowing easy access to the recessed seating area, while the back and sides are enclosed by the frame. The interior of the seat is smooth and appears to be molded for ergonomic comfort, contrasting with the sharp, angular exterior. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban parks, plazas, or stylish public spaces. The materials and finish suggest durability and easy maintenance for outdoor or high-traffic environments.
description: A sleek, modern chaise with a glossy black square frame, deep semi-circular seat, and minimalist metal legs. The design is open at the front and enclosed on the sides and back, offering a contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the open access to the deep, semi-circular seat within the square frame, with the metal legs visible beneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the curved seat basin and the thin, tubular metal legs supporting the structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the enclosed back of the chaise and the symmetrical support from the metal legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, emphasizing the seat's curvature and the frame's thickness.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is formed by the rear section of the square frame, rising to the same height as the sides and providing a continuous, solid support. It is flat, unsegmented, and lacks decorative elements, emphasizing a minimalist, modern aesthetic.
attribute_armrest_presence: Both sides of the chaise have integrated armrests formed by the raised edges of the square frame, which are flat and extend the full depth of the seat.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are slender, straight, and tubular, made of metal with a polished finish. They are positioned at the corners and connected by horizontal supports for stability, contributing to the chaise's modern, open look.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The seat and frame surfaces are smooth and solid, with no visible upholstery pattern, tufting, or quilting. The finish is glossy and untextured.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are no visible loose or attached cushions; the seating area is a single, molded piece integrated into the frame, providing a continuous and seamless surface.
